title: Don Powell
compiled_truth: Don Powell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2002-01-22), Don Powell sent 3 and received 257 emails, totalling 260 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kevin Hyatt](people/kevin-hyatt) (2), [Jeffery Fawcett](people/jeffery-fawcett) (1), [Ken Powers](people/ken-powers) (1), [Steve Gilbert](people/steve-gilbert) (1), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (1). Mailbox folders observed: personal.
